sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْخُبْزُ عُنْصُرًا لَا غِنَى عَنْهُ عَلَى الْمَائِدَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، فَقَدْ ارْتَبَطَ دَائِمًا بِمَفْهُومِ الْبَرَكَةِ وَالْعَيْشِ الْمُشْتَرَكِ.
sentences.translation: Hljeb se smatra neizostavnim elementom na arapskoj trpezi, jer je oduvijek bio povezan s konceptom blagoslova i zajedničkog života.
sentences.translationEn: Bread is considered an indispensable element on the Arab table, as it has always been linked to the concept of blessing and communal living.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ عَمَلِيَّةُ صُنْعِ الْخُبْزِ التَّقْلِيدِيِّ بِعَجْنِ الدَّقِيقِ مَعَ الْمَاءِ وَالْخَمِيرَةِ حَتَّى تُصْبِحَ الْعَجِينَةُ لَيِّنَةً وَمُتَمَاسِكَةً.
sentences.translation: Proces pravljenja tradicionalnog hljeba počinje miješenjem brašna s vodom i kvascem dok tijesto ne postane mekano i kompaktno.
sentences.translationEn: The process of making traditional bread begins by kneading flour with water and yeast until the dough becomes soft and cohesive.

sentences.arabic: يُتْرَكُ الْعَجِينُ لِيَتَخَمَّرَ فِي مَكَانٍ دَافِئٍ، مِمَّا يَسْمَحُ لَهُ بِالِارْتِفَاعِ وَاكْتِسَابِ الْقَوَامِ الْمَطْلُوبِ قَبْلَ عَمَلِيَّةِ الْخَبْزِ.
sentences.translation: Tijesto se ostavlja da fermentira na toplom mjestu, što mu omogućava da naraste i dobije željenu teksturu prije pečenja.
sentences.translationEn: The dough is left to ferment in a warm place, allowing it to rise and acquire the desired texture before the baking process.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يُوضَعُ الرَّغِيفُ فِي الْفُرْنِ الْحَجَرِيِّ السَّاخِنِ، تَنْتَشِرُ رَائِحَةٌ زَكِيَّةٌ تَمْلَأُ أَرْجَاءَ الْبَيْتِ وَتُثِيرُ الشَّهِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Kada se hljeb stavi u vrelu kamenu peć, širi se prijatan miris koji ispunjava kuću i budi apetit.
sentences.translationEn: When the loaf is placed in the hot stone oven, a pleasant aroma spreads, filling the house and stimulating the appetite.

sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ الْكَثِيرُونَ تَنَاوُلَ الْخُبْزِ وَهُوَ سَاخِنٌ مَعَ الْقَلِيلِ مِنَ الزَّيْتِ وَالزَّعْتَرِ، مِمَّا يُشَكِّلُ وَجْبَةً بَسِيطَةً وَلَذِيذَةً.
sentences.translation: Mnogi radije jedu hljeb dok je vruć s malo ulja i začina (za'tar), što čini jednostavan i ukusan obrok.
sentences.translationEn: Many prefer to eat the bread while it is hot with a little oil and thyme (za'tar), forming a simple and delicious meal.
